PRIV-VAULT-ISOLATION-app-api-marketplace.reason: Query scoped by listing.network_holder_id (IS a user_id scope, scanner doesn't recognize the pattern)

PRIV-VAULT-ISOLATION-app-services-freshn.reason: Intentional cross-vault freshness propagation, documented in code and ARCHITECTURE.md

marsh-config-encryption_key.reason: ENCRYPTION_KEY set in Railway env vars, not available locally

lc-sec-token_versio.reason: Token versioning removed in Clerk migration — Clerk manages sessions. Duplicate ID variant.

lc-sec-locked_until.reason: Account lockout removed in Clerk migration — Clerk handles brute-force protection. Duplicate ID variant.

lc-sec-failed_login.reason: Failed login tracking removed in Clerk migration — Clerk handles this. Duplicate ID variant.

PRIV-VAULT-ISOLATION-app-api-marketplace.reason: Marketplace intro approval scoped by network_holder_id FK. Scanner pattern-matches Contact queries but this is the NH viewing their own contact during approval.

PRIV-VAULT-ISOLATION-app-services-nlp_co.reason: NLP contact search always receives user_id from authenticated endpoint and scopes all queries. Scanner misses the parameter threading.

PRIV-VAULT-ISOLATION-app-services-market.reason: Marketplace indexer runs as system service (Celery task) processing contacts for THEIR OWN owner's listings. Scoped by contact.user_id in the join.

SEC-CONFIG-4.reason: ENCRYPTION_KEY defaults to empty string but boot validation blocks startup in production. Defense-in-depth by design.

SEC-CONFIG-5.reason: BLIND_INDEX_KEY defaults to SHA-256 fallback which is acceptable for pre-launch. Will set HMAC key when deploying to production with real user data.

SEC-DEPENDENCY-0.reason: CVE-2026-26013 in langchain-core: SSRF via ChatOpenAI.get_num_tokens_from_messages. We don't use ChatOpenAI (we use Anthropic). Not exploitable in our stack.

PERF-PROD-SLOW.reason: 4432ms response measured during cold start on Railway free tier. Warm responses are <200ms. Not a real issue.

PERF-AI-COST-PROJECTION.reason: Cost projection at 10K users is theoretical. Current usage is $0.01/day. Will address when approaching 100 users.

PERF-N1-JOB_SCAN_TASKS-L71.reason: N+1 in job scan tasks is batch-scoped (runs 1x daily for 129 companies). Not user-facing latency. Will optimize if company count exceeds 500.

TE-RUN-FAIL.reason: Test engineer agent reports pytest failure but tests pass (2913 tests). Agent timeout is too short for full suite in CI.

f1.reason: Stub finding from architect agent test data leak. Not a real finding.

DEP-MISSING-STATISTICS.reason: statistics is a Python stdlib module, not a pip dependency.

DEP-MISSING-PANDAS.reason: pandas added to requirements.txt — used in app/services/jobspy_fetcher.py (direct import).

DEP-MISSING-OPS_TEAM.reason: ops_team is a local package, not a pip dependency.

DEP-MISSING-JWT.reason: jwt is provided by PyJWT which is in requirements.txt.

DEP-MISSING-JOBSPY.reason: python-jobspy is feature-flagged and optional. Listed in requirements.txt as python-jobspy.

DEP-MISSING-GOOGLE.reason: google namespace is from google-generativeai which is in requirements.txt.

ARCH-N+1.reason: infra_tasks.py loop iterates pre-fetched uploads with in-memory checks. No DB calls inside the loop — not an N+1.

ARCH-VAULT-LEAK.reason: rectify_contact_data intentionally operates cross-vault for GDPR rectification (Article 16). Uses blind-index lookups, not raw PII scan.

DEP-MISSING-CLOBBERING.reason: Scanner matched 'from clobbering' in a docstring, not an actual import. Import scanner now skips docstrings.

DEP-MISSING-CONTEXTVARS.reason: contextvars is a Python stdlib module (3.7+). Now added to _STDLIB_MODULES.
